reviews.author: Farhan Azizi
reviews.text: The team at Forma Creative really understood our brand vision. The identity system they built is clean, consistent, and already turning heads. Highly recommend.

reviews.author: Liyana Hassan
reviews.text: Our website redesign was handled end to end — strategy, design, and development. The result speaks for itself. Professional team with real creative depth.

reviews.author: Marcus Ong
reviews.text: Best design studio we've worked with in KL. They push back when something's off and deliver work that actually performs. That's rare.

reviews.author: Siti Aisyah
reviews.text: Great communication throughout the project. Timeline was tight but they delivered. The brand refresh was exactly what we needed heading into our relaunch.

reviews.author: Reza Aminuddin
reviews.text: Forma Creative built our entire content system from scratch — templates, photography direction, the works. Our social engagement doubled within a month.

reviews.author: Cheryl Ng
reviews.text: A studio that genuinely cares about the work they put out. They presented three distinct directions and walked us through the thinking behind each. That level of care shows.
